reviews.comment:
Buena atención, baños óptimos. Excelente parquizado con cabañas muy lindas. Muchas flores. Todo muy cuidado

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, great bathrooms. Beautiful grounds with lovely cabins. Lots of flowers. Everything is very well maintained.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2c2RYNzBnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Casi es una parada obligada, para comer, cargar nafta o simplemente tomar un café para seguir viaje...

(Translated by Google)
It's practically a mandatory stop, whether to eat, fill up with gas, or simply grab a coffee before continuing your journey...
